question: [File: 'File Name: rest/service/entityService.js -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: getEntityIdFromEvmAddress()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a non-network DoS by exploiting the fact that getEntityIdFromEvmAddress() allocates a new Buffer via Buffer.from(entityId.evmAddress, 'hex') on every invocation, and under high concurrency with unique EVM addresses, the repeated 20-byte Buffer allocations create sustained GC pressure that degrades overall Node.js event loop throughput?
